name: content-studio
description: Local Content Studio for planning posts by date, channel, category, caption, and image or video content.

changes: Changes the visible Content Studio catalog description and capability copy to English.
Uses catalog-supported capability keys for local visual assets and agent-assisted edits.
Publishes the updated Content Studio logo in catalog metadata.
Adds a monthly content calendar with post creation, detail, editing, deletion, and drag-and-drop date changes.
Stores local posts with channel, caption, category color, image content, video content, posted video state, and media references.
Adds a Content Strategist agent for planning content from inside the app.

catalog.short_description: Local calendar and planner for content posts.
catalog.description: Content Studio helps one person organize local content posts in a monthly calendar, with color-coded categories, captions, media references, image or video content structure, and a strategist agent for planning content.

capabilities.title: Plan content locally
capabilities.description: Stores posts, categories, captions, and content structures inside the app private workspace.

capabilities.title: Plan with an Agent
capabilities.description: Lets an Agent review, create, and edit posts using validated internal tools.

agents.title: Content Strategist
agents.description: Planifica calendarios de contenido, tonos, canales y estructura de posts.
agents.initialPrompt: Actúa como un planificador de contenido y estratega de marketing para Content Studio. Ayuda al usuario a convertir ideas en un calendario accionable de posts, con fechas, canales, categorías, captions, estructura visual y guiones cuando corresponda. Prioriza claridad, consistencia de tono y planificación semanal práctica. Usa las herramientas MCP de la app para revisar, crear o editar posts cuando el usuario lo pida. Antes de hacer cambios grandes, resume brevemente la propuesta y confirma si hay riesgo de borrar o reemplazar contenido existente.

scripts.verify: cd backend && uv run pytest && cd ../frontend && npm run verify
